title: About Us
subtitle: Tell your brand's story, vision, and value in a few sentences.
storyP1: Tell your brand's origins, motivation, and current position. Include key turning points.
storyP2: Continue your story. Deepen the journey mentioned in the first paragraph.
missionDesc: Describe your brand's core purpose and user value.
valuesDesc: Share the core values that define your brand.
teamDesc: Describe your team structure, culture, and collaboration.
qualityDesc: Emphasize quality standards and user experience focus.
ctaDesc: Update this CTA based on your goals.
